Class CorrelatedEventHandler<RequestData, EventT extends SfsCorrelatedEventModel, HandledT>

java.lang.Object
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.handling.EventHandler<RequestData, EventT, HandledT>
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.handling.CorrelatedEventHandler<RequestData, EventT, HandledT>
Direct Known Subclasses:
CorrelatedResultResponseHandler, UpdateMonsterHandler, UpdateStructureHandler
public abstract class CorrelatedEventHandler<RequestData, EventT extends SfsCorrelatedEventModel, HandledT> extends EventHandler<RequestData, EventT, HandledT>
